mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FD_SHARE_PLATFORM_LOG (OPER_ID, BUSINESS_TYPE, OPER_USER_NAME, OPER_URL, OPER_IP, STATUS, OPER_TIME, OPER_PARAM, JSON_RESULT, ERROR_MSG, OPER_USER_ID, COST_TIME,INVOICE_ID) VALUES (#{operId}, #{businessType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{operParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jsonResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
